title: Paul Magoffin
extract: Paul Parker "Maggie" Magoffin (March 30, 1883 – February 1, 1956) was an American football player.  He played left halfback for Fielding H. Yost's University of Michigan Wolverines football teams of 1904, 1905, 1906 and 1907, and was captain of the 1907 team.  He later served as a football coach at North Dakota State University and George Washington University.
